experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.company: ICS Scheduling — University of California, Irvine
bullets: Built a Next.js/TypeScript web app with a React drag-and-drop calendar for module scheduling.
Developed RESTful Node.js/Express APIs backed by MongoDB Atlas to manage courses, user roles, classrooms, modules, and messaging.
Ran Agile sprints: delivered bi-weekly demos, managed Git feature branches, and iterated on Figma wireframes.

projects.name: ClinSpark Master Schedule
bullets: Developed a production-deployed, full-stack scheduling platform for clinical trial e-source builders with real-time study tracking, Gantt chart visualization, role-based access control, and audit logging.
Built a React/TypeScript frontend with a FastAPI/PostgreSQL backend, implementing JWT authentication with HttpOnly cookies, edit-lock conflict prevention, and one-click Excel export workflows.

projects.name: Tampermonkey Automation Suite
bullets: Developed browser automation scripts across ClinSpark, Florence eBinder, and Microsoft Teams, automating multi-step data-entry workflows, eLog signing, and meeting attendance tracking.
Built resilient DOM automation using localStorage state machines, MutationObserver, and virtual-scroll scanning, reducing routine workflow time by approximately 60–70%.

projects.name: Fablix Movie DB Web Application
bullets: Developed a full-stack movie database with secure login, full-text search, and auto-complete.
Set up AWS instances, MySQL, and Tomcat, optimizing performance for handling thousands of movies.

projects.name: Spacetime Crawler
bullets: Developed a web crawler optimized for the ICS server, focusing on efficient data gathering and analysis.
Implemented unique page detection, subdomain mapping, and content analysis for comprehensive site exploration.
